required_preferences.fact: Handles translation, medical paperwork, and coordination for her parents throughout the week via phone and email — no longer confines these tasks to Sunday dinner visits

supersedes.fact: Helps parents with translation and paperwork during dinner visits — never delegates these tasks to others

required_preferences.fact: Now connects with her brother through short, frequent check-ins multiple times a week — prioritizes responsiveness over in-depth weekend calls due to her role as his university advocate and need to address time-sensitive university matters promptly

supersedes.fact: Prefers scheduling extended phone/video calls with her brother every weekend to discuss his progress and address travel and housing issues — avoids short, daily chats

required_preferences.fact: Checks sodium content and nutritional information for every meal before eating — never consumes foods without confirming sodium levels first
Prepares a summary of research findings at the end of each month for oversight committee reports — never skips documentation even during busy weeks
Checks her phone for family updates and urgent messages multiple times daily — prioritizes responsiveness to her parents and father's medical situation over previous notification limits

Checks university admissions and financial aid portals for her brother daily to monitor deadlines, requests, and document status — never delegates these logins to her brother or parents due to language barriers and urgency

persona: A first-generation college student pursuing a master's in biology
